description: A wide, low-horizon landscape of arid, sandy terrain stretching across the composition. A rocky brown outcrop or mesa rises at the center-left, its stratified walls catching warm sunlight. To the far right, a slender white minaret or tower stands against a pale blue sky. The foreground is flat, dusty ground with sparse scrub vegetation in muted greens and browns. A few indistinct dark forms — possibly figures or structures — cluster near the base of the minaret. The sky is hazy and pale, suggesting dry heat. The overall palette is dominated by ochres, tans, and muted blues.
